name: Greek Honey Cream with Fruits and Nuts
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 325°F.
2. Place all nuts in a baking pan and bake until lightly toasted, stirring occasionally, about 15 minutes. Cool completely.
3. Using an electric mixer, beat honey in a large bowl until thick and pale, about 2 minutes.
4. Whip cream in another large bowl until stiff peaks form.
5. Fold nuts into the whipped cream.
6. Gently fold the cream into the honey, leaving a few streaks of cream.
7. Cover and refrigerate until well chilled and slightly set, about 2 hours (can be prepared up to 1 day ahead).
8. Place a dollop of honey cream on each plate. Surround with fruit and serve.
